questionHtml: Predict, giving a reason, how the final enthalpy of reaction calculated from this experiment would compare with the theoretical value.
markschemeHtml:
lower/less exothermic/less negative AND heat loss/some heat not accounted for
OR
lower/less exothermic/less negative AND mass of reaction mixture greater than 25.00 g
OR
greater/more exothermic/more negative AND specific heat of solution less than water    [✔]

meta.title: Predict, giving a reason, how the final enthalpy of reaction calculated from this experiment would compare with the theoretical value.
